# Stratezik — extended LLM index

> Toronto digital marketing agency. Canonical site: https://www.stratezik.com

## Core pages

- [Home](https://www.stratezik.com/): Digital marketing services, SEO, PPC, strategy, contact
- [Blog index](https://www.stratezik.com/blog): Articles on SEO, AEO, local search, paid media
- [Careers](https://www.stratezik.com/careers): Toronto team hiring

## Blog articles (11)

### When GTA SMBs Decide It Is Time for a Digital Marketing Agency
- URL: https://www.stratezik.com/blog/when-hire-digital-marketing-agency-scarborough-gta
- Summary: Ten real triggers Scarborough and Toronto SMBs hit before hiring an agency: flat conversions, rising ad waste, Maps gaps, launches, expansion, reviews, bandwidth limits, and seasonal urgency, plus Stratezik audit steps and an RFP checklist.
- Published: 2026-05-25
- Updated: 2026-05-25

### How Businesses Get Found and Grow in 2026, Part 1: Brand and Positioning
- URL: https://www.stratezik.com/blog/get-found-2026-brand-positioning
- Summary: Positioning before tactics: differentiation that survives the competitor test, voice and visual identity, reputation systems, and trust signals that make SEO, AI, content, and paid work harder together.
- Published: 2026-05-25
- Updated: 2026-05-25

### How Businesses Get Found and Grow in 2026, Part 2: SEO and Organic Search
- URL: https://www.stratezik.com/blog/get-found-2026-seo-organic-search
- Summary: Keyword fanout, answer-first on-page work, technical plumbing, backlink authority, and indexing gates. Why organic search remains the bedrock AI visibility builds on, not a rival to it.
- Published: 2026-05-25
- Updated: 2026-05-25

### Why Service Businesses Lose on Google Maps
- URL: https://www.stratezik.com/blog/google-maps-ranking-service-business

- Updated: 2026-05-07

### How We Scaled a Toronto Pest Control Company: The Insectica Story (700+ Leads, Full Breakdown)
- URL: https://www.stratezik.com/blog/insectica-gta-pest-control-scaling-case-study
- Summary: Month-by-month narrative of Insectica Pest Control’s GTA growth: ten ad groups, CPA-first bidding, 700+ paid conversions at ~$43 CPL, organic impressions up 168x, plus charts and infographic.

- Updated: 2026-05-03
